task: Prod 400 fix: task-create POST sent a double-stringified body ('"{...}"') so the server rejected with 400 'expected object, received string'. Root cause: api/tasks.ts pre-stringified the body with JSON.stringify(...) while apiRequest (api/client.ts) already does the single JSON.stringify(options.body). Fix (frontend only, no migration): pass the RAW OBJECT to apiRequest in createTask + createTaskType + updateTaskProgress so the client performs the single stringify and the outgoing body is a bare object (starts with '{', not '"{'). Adds api/tasks.test.ts regression asserting the request body is an object.
